title: Oil prices rise in choppy trade as Trump plans to 'free' ships stranded due to Mideast conflict
summary: A tanker was hit by projectiles near Fujairah in the UAE, contributing to volatile oil trading amid regional tensions. Trump's announcement to "free" stranded ships could impact energy market stability. The incident underscores ongoing disruptions to global oil supplies.
content: The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations agency said Monday that a tanker was hit by projectiles north of the city of of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates.

zh.title: 油价波动上升，特朗普计划"解救"因中东冲突搁浅的船只
zh.summary: 一艘油轮在阿联酋富吉拉附近遭到炮击，加剧了地区紧张局势下油价波动。特朗普宣布"解救"搁浅船只可能影响能源市场稳定。该事件突显了对全球油气供应的持续破坏。

title: GameStop offers to buy eBay for $56bn
summary: GameStop has proposed acquiring eBay for $56 billion, with CEO Ryan Cohen expressing confidence in transforming it into a stronger Amazon competitor. The deal signals GameStop's expansion beyond gaming retail into broader e-commerce. The acquisition would represent major consolidation in the online marketplace sector.
content: GameStop's chief executive Ryan Cohen told the Wall Street Journal that he sees potential to make eBay a much bigger rival to Amazon.

zh.title: GameStop提议以560亿美元收购eBay
zh.summary: GameStop提议以560亿美元收购eBay，首席执行官瑞恩·科亨表示有信心将其转变为更强有力的亚马逊竞争对手。该交易表明GameStop正在从游戏零售扩展到更广泛的电子商务领域。这项收购将代表在线市场部门的重大整合。

title: Investors appear skeptical as Trump touts new plan to partially reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Trump announced plans to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but investors remained skeptical about feasibility and implementation. Shipping has been stranded in the Persian Gulf due to the Iran conflict, disrupting global trade flows. Market hesitation reflects doubts about the proposal's effectiveness.
content: Investors appeared skeptical Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. will work to “free” neutral shipping that’s been stranded in the Persian Gulf since the start of the war with Iran.

zh.title: 投资者表示怀疑，特朗普推介部分重开霍尔木兹海峡新计划
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布了重开霍尔木兹海峡的计划，但投资者对其可行性和实施情况持怀疑态度。由于伊朗冲突，船只在波斯湾搁浅，中断全球贸易流动。市场的犹豫反映了人们对该提议有效性的怀疑。

title: South Korean stocks hit fresh record, building on historic monthly rally in April
summary: South Korean stocks reached fresh record highs, extending a strong rally from April. Asian markets opened mixed as investors assessed Trump's Strait of Hormuz initiative and its economic implications. The performance reflects positive sentiment in the region despite broader uncertainties.
content: Asia markets were set to open mixed Monday as investors assess news of President Donald Trump's plan to "free" ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 韩国股市创新高，4月创历史性涨幅纪录
zh.summary: 韩国股市创历史新高，延续4月的强劲涨势。亚洲市场开盘涨跌不一，投资者评估特朗普的霍尔木兹海峡倡议及其经济影响。尽管存在更广泛的不确定性，该地区的表现反映了积极情绪。
